title: Roblox Swords
description: This is a resourcepack that changes normal swords into swords from roblox. Adds 6 different swords from roblox.
body: This texture pack adds 6 different swords from minecraft. Changes the wood sword to the Wooden Sword the stone sword to the Claymore the iron sword to the Linked Sword the gold sword to the Sword of Light the diamond sword to the Illumina the netherite sword to the Darkheart.
